storyHook: 拨号问候，说明来意，确认时间后挂断

narrative.when: 周三下午，牙医诊所五点下班前
narrative.where: 甲在自己办公室，乙在诊所前台
narrative.who: 甲（患者）· 乙（诊所接线员）
narrative.how: 用手机拨打诊所电话，安静环境通话
narrative.method: 自报姓名、说明牙疼、选时间、记下预约、确认地址
narrative.event: 甲牙疼两天了，必须今天约上明天的号，否则耽误出差

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good day, this is the place for teeth. How may I help you?
turns.zh: 下午好，这里是看牙的地方。有什么能帮您的？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I would like to see someone about my tooth.
turns.zh: 我想找个人看看我的牙。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, sir. What name, please?
turns.zh: 好的，先生。请问您怎么称呼？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, that is me.
turns.zh: 是的，是我。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thank you, Brown. What is the trouble?
turns.zh: 谢谢，布朗。是什么问题？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The pain in my right lower tooth has been two days now.
turns.zh: 我右下边的牙疼了两天了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I see. Is it a sharp pain or a slow pain?
turns.zh: 我明白了。是刺痛还是隐隐作痛？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: It comes and goes, sharp at times. Having food is hard.
turns.zh: 一阵一阵的，有时候很刺痛。吃东西都困难。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That sounds bad. We are free tomorrow at ten in the morning.
turns.zh: 听起来挺严重的。我们明天上午十点有空。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is good. I will take it.
turns.zh: 那太好了。我就约这个时间。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Okay. Let me check our system for your card.
turns.zh: 好的。我先在系统里查一下您的卡。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I have my card ready. It is in my pocket.
turns.zh: 我准备好卡了，就在我口袋里。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. Have you been to our dentist office before?
turns.zh: 好的。您以前来过我们牙医诊所吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, last year. But now my lower tooth is in bad pain.
turns.zh: 有的，去年来过。但现在我下牙疼得厉害。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I see. We will need to check it and maybe make a picture.
turns.zh: 我明白了。我们需要做个检查，可能还要拍个片。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The pain is sharp. I could not sleep last night.
turns.zh: 疼得很刺骨。我昨晚都没睡着。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is not good. The doctor will check you tomorrow at ten.
turns.zh: 那可不好。医生明天上午十点会给您看。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Thank you. That works well for me.
turns.zh: 谢谢。这个时间对我挺合适的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Please bring your medical card with you.
turns.zh: 请带上您的医保卡。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will. Should I come a bit early?
turns.zh: 我会的。我需要稍微早点来吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, about five minutes early to write down your address.
turns.zh: 是的，提前大约五分钟，来登记一下您的地址。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will do that. I know the street name, High Street.
turns.zh: 我会的。我知道那条街的名字，高街。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. Is it a sharp pain or a slow one?
turns.zh: 好的。是刺痛还是隐隐作痛？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Sharp, like a shock. It keeps me up at night.
turns.zh: 刺痛，像电击一样。晚上都睡不好。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is not good. We will have a look tomorrow. Please come at ten.
turns.zh: 那可不好。我们明天检查一下。请十点到。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Thank you. Is there anything I need to take?
turns.zh: 谢谢。我需要带什么东西吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, your medical card and your name card, please.
turns.zh: 是的，请带上医保卡和姓名卡。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Where is the place?
turns.zh: 这个地方在哪里？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It is 15 High Street, near the old church.
turns.zh: 在高街15号，老教堂附近。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. I will be there at ten tomorrow.
turns.zh: 好的。我明天十点到。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. And your number for the phone, please.
turns.zh: 好的。请再留一下您的电话号码。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thank you. I will leave, Brown.
turns.zh: 谢谢。我先走了，布朗。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Thank you. sure.
turns.zh: 谢谢你。好的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: sure. be safe.
turns.zh: 好的。安全第一。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: sure. I will put the line down now.
turns.zh: 好的。我挂电话了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: One more thing. Please take your card.
turns.zh: 还有一件事。请带上您的卡。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, I have it. And my medical card too.
turns.zh: 好的，我带着。医保卡也带着。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. So all is ready for tomorrow.
turns.zh: 很好。那明天的预约就都安排好了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Thank you. I will okay at ten.
turns.zh: 谢谢你。明天十点见。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. So I will come in at ten.
turns.zh: 好的。那我十点到。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, ten. Please be on time.
turns.zh: 是的，十点。请准时。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will. Do I need to put my name down first?
turns.zh: 我会的。去之前要先登记吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No need. Just come to the front and give your name.
turns.zh: 不用。直接来前台报名字就行。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. And what about the price for a first look?
turns.zh: 好的。那初诊多少钱？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: It is thirty eight for a look over.
turns.zh: 检查费是三十八英镑。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is good. Do I give money that day?
turns.zh: 可以。当天付吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, after the test. We take card or notes.
turns.zh: 是的，检查后付。刷卡或现金都行。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I will take my card then.
turns.zh: 好的。那我带卡来。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. I will leave, A.
turns.zh: 好的。我先走了，甲。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: One more thing. What if the pain gets worse tonight?
turns.zh: 再问一句。要是今晚疼得更厉害怎么办？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Get a medicine from the store. No more than two.
turns.zh: 去店里买个止痛药。别超过两片。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: And if I can't get to sleep?
turns.zh: 那要是疼得睡不着呢？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Put a cold cloth on your face. That helps.
turns.zh: 拿冷毛巾敷脸。管用。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will do that. Is there a number for night talk?
turns.zh: 我试试。有夜间联系电话吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No, we are shut after five. But the hospital is open.
turns.zh: 没有，五点后关门。但医院开着。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Quite. I will keep that in mind.
turns.zh: 也行。我记下了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Do you have any other questions?
turns.zh: 好的。还有其他问题吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: No, that is all. Thank you for your help.
turns.zh: 没了，就这些。谢谢你帮忙。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You are welcome. I will leave at ten.
turns.zh: 不客气。明天十点见。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. alright then.
turns.zh: 好。到时候见。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: One small thing, sir. Please come five minutes early to put your name on a paper.
turns.zh: 先生，还有个小事情。请提前五分钟来填张表。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Five minutes early. That is good.
turns.zh: 提前五分钟。没问题。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: And have your card ready.
turns.zh: 还有请准备好证件。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I have it here. Will do.
turns.zh: 我带着呢。会的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Great. Do you have the name of the road?
turns.zh: 太好了。您知道那条路的名字吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, I have it on paper. Road name, number 88.
turns.zh: 知道，我记在纸上了。路名，88号。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is the one. Second floor, room 203.
turns.zh: 就是那里。二楼，203室。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Second floor, 203. Got it.
turns.zh: 二楼，203。记下了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. I will leave.
turns.zh: 好的。我先走了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Please take your card and papers.
turns.zh: 请带上你的医保卡和证件。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will. What more?
turns.zh: 会的。还有别的吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: No, that is all. okay at ten.
turns.zh: 没了，就这些。十点见。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: alright then. By the way, do you take pictures inside the body?
turns.zh: 到时候见。顺便问一下，你们拍身体内部的片子吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes. The doctor will see if you need one.
turns.zh: 是的。医生会看您是否需要。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. My tooth might need a look inside.
turns.zh: 好的。我这牙可能得看看里面。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: We will be safe of it. Do you have any pain now?
turns.zh: 我们会处理的。您现在疼吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: A bit, but that is good till tomorrow.
turns.zh: 有点，但能忍到明天。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Take a medicine if you need. I will leave.
turns.zh: 需要的话吃点止痛药。我先走了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will. Thank you. sure.
turns.zh: 好的。谢谢你。好的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. So tomorrow at ten, yes?
turns.zh: 行。那明天十点，对吧？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is right. Your name is on the list.
turns.zh: 对的。您名字已经登记上了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Do I have to take my medical card and my name card?
turns.zh: 我还要带医保卡和身份证吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, please. And any pictures if you have them.
turns.zh: 是的，请带上。如果有片子也带上。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I have no pictures of my bones. Will you make new ones?
turns.zh: 我没有骨头的照片。你们会拍新的吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The doctor will have a look. If we need it, we do it here.
turns.zh: 医生会看情况。需要的话我们这里可以拍。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. How long will the first look take?
turns.zh: 好的。初诊大概要多久？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: About thirty minutes. Then we see what to do after that.
turns.zh: 大约半小时。然后看下一步怎么处理。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is good. I have a plane after my meal.
turns.zh: 那时间够。我吃完饭后有航班。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: We will get you out in time. No need to be troubled.
turns.zh: 我们会让您及时离开的。不用烦恼。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I am ready for tomorrow.
turns.zh: 好的，那我明天就准备好了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, you are. Is there anything more I can do?
turns.zh: 是的，您都准备好了。还有什么我能帮您的吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: No, that is all. But what if the pain gets worse tonight?
turns.zh: 没了，就这些。但要是今晚疼得更厉害怎么办？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Get a medicine from the store. Do not take more than the box says.
turns.zh: 去药店买个止痛药。别超过药盒上的用量。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good idea. I have some at the house. I will take one before bed.
turns.zh: 好主意。家里有，我睡前吃一片。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is wise. And keep a cold cloth on your face if it is bad.
turns.zh: 那很明智。要是疼得厉害，用冷毛巾敷脸。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will do that. Thank you for your help. I will leave.
turns.zh: 我会的。谢谢你的帮忙。我先走了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You are welcome. I will leave.
turns.zh: 不客气。我先走了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: sure. And thanks for the suggestion.
turns.zh: 好的。也谢谢你的建议。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: sure. Get some rest tonight.
turns.zh: 好的。今晚好好休息。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will. You have a good evening too.
turns.zh: 我会的。你也晚上好。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Thank you. The door is still open if you need us.
turns.zh: 谢谢。如果你需要我们，门还开着。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is kind. I will keep that in mind.
turns.zh: 你真好。我会记住的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Have a safe walk to your car.
turns.zh: 走到推车那边注意安全。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am still in my office, but thanks.
turns.zh: 我还在办公室，不过谢谢。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Oh, right. Well then, rest up.
turns.zh: 哦，对。那好吧，好好休息。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: rest up. And sure.
turns.zh: 好好休息。好的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Well, rest up. And sure.
turns.zh: 好。再会。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Goodbye. Get some rest tonight.
turns.zh: 再见。今晚好好歇着。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Well, i will. You have a good evening too.
turns.zh: 我会的。你也晚安。

storyBlurb: 牙疼两天，明天就要出差，必须今天约上号。一通电话，能否顺利挂上明天的牙医？
storyScript:
【开场·拨号问候】周三下午四点，甲坐在办公室的转椅上，左手捂着半边脸，右手拿起手机拨出牙医诊所的号码。电话响了两声，那头传来乙清晰而温和的声音：「您好，这里是康齿牙医诊所，请问有什么可以帮您？」甲清了清嗓子，尽量让声音听起来不那么含混：「你好，我想预约看牙。」乙应声：「好的，先生，请问您怎么称呼？」甲报上姓名，乙在键盘上敲击记录。

【进行·说明来意】甲说牙疼已经两天了，右边下排的牙齿一阵阵抽痛，吃东西都困难。乙询问疼痛的性质和持续时间，甲一一回答，语气里带着急切。乙安抚道：「您别急，我们明天上午十点还有一个空位，您看可以吗？」甲心里一松，连忙说可以。乙补充：「这个时间是半小时的初诊检查，如果后续需要治疗再另约时间。」甲表示理解。

【进行·确认细节】乙请甲留下联系电话，并核对了一遍：「您是甲先生，明天上午十点，对吗？」甲确认。乙又说：「请您记一下我们的地址，XX路XX号，到了前台报名字就行。」甲从笔筒里抽出一支笔，在便签纸上飞快记下。乙提醒：「明天请带上医保卡和身份证。」甲应声，心里盘算着时间，明天看完牙还来得及赶下午的飞机。

【收束·礼貌挂断】甲道谢：「好的，谢谢你，明天见。」乙礼貌回应：「不客气，祝您早日康复，明天见。」电话挂断，甲放下手机，长舒一口气，牙疼似乎也缓解了几分。他拿起便签纸看了一眼，小心地夹进记事本里。
